title: The Supplier GMP Audit Lifecycle
alt: Five ordered stages of running a supplier GMP audit, from risk ranking to CAPA closure

items.label: Rank by risk
items.desc: Set audit scope and frequency using ICH Q9 risk management

items.label: Plan and prepare
items.desc: Define scope, build the audit pack and pre-audit questionnaire

items.label: Conduct on site
items.desc: Audit the process flow and verify against objective evidence

items.label: Classify and report
items.desc: Grade critical, major, minor findings against GMP requirements

items.label: Drive CAPA and re-qualify
items.desc: Verify root-cause closure, then update supplier status
